  • Reference
    • Intoduction
    • Analysing crowdsourced relevance assessments (Roitero et al. 2021)

Plot a rating_data object

Source: R/plot.R
plot.rating_data.Rd

Plot a rating_data object

Usage

# S3 method for class 'rating_data'
plot(x, ...)

Arguments

x

A rating_data object from rating_data().

...

Ignored.

Value

Invisibly returns x. Called for its side effect (a rating matrix plot).

Examples

# \donttest{
dt <- sim_data(J = 20, B = 5, AGREEMENT = 0.6,
               ALPHA = rep(0, 20), DATA_TYPE = "continuous", SEED = 1)
rd <- rating_data(dt$rating, dt$id_item, dt$id_worker, VERBOSE = FALSE)
plot(rd)

# }
